risk_description: INR depreciation risk on imported turbine components (EUR denominated)
mitigation_action: Forward cover for EUR 1.2M; locked at 91.5 INR/EUR

risk_description: Delay risk due to monsoon impact on civil works — LD at 0.75%/week
mitigation_action: Accelerate civil works pre-monsoon; maintain 4-week float in schedule

risk_description: Membrane and chemical costs trending upward — 8% YoY increase
mitigation_action: Lock membrane pricing with supplier for 12 months; chemical AMC has escalation clause

risk_description: Advance payment overdue by 37 days; customer in sugar sector cash crunch
mitigation_action: Escalate to Bajaj CFO; halt fabrication if advance not received by April 15; invoke PO cancellation clause

risk_description: Competitive bidding pressure may reduce margin below 12% threshold
mitigation_action: Include value engineering options in bid; maintain floor price of ₹265 Cr

risk_description: Transit insurance for oversized heaters via road transport — higher premiums
mitigation_action: Obtain comprehensive transit insurance; ONGC bears inland transit risk per PO terms

risk_description: Top 3 orders represent 65% of current order book value — customer concentration risk
mitigation_action: Diversify pipeline across sectors and regions; increase mid-market order intake

risk_description: Performance bank guarantee of ₹5.7 Cr (20% of PO) — above typical 10% threshold
mitigation_action: Accepted per customer requirement; ensure timely performance acceptance to release BG
